articles.title: Women Wanted: Kalshi Pushes to Expand Far Beyond Sport Bets
articles.summary: Kalshi is actively recruiting women to diversify its user base beyond the typical sports betting demographic. The push signals prediction markets are maturing from a niche male-dominated hobby into mainstream financial instruments that need broader participation to create deeper, more accurate markets.

articles.title: Everything from the last week of everything is gambling now
articles.summary: The gambling industry expanded into yet another corner of daily life this week, with new betting markets launching on everything from weather patterns to celebrity baby names. When literally everything becomes bettable, prediction markets get both more data to work with and more noise to filter through.

articles.title: Prediction markets are a national security threat
articles.summary: Someone's arguing that prediction markets could compromise national security by revealing classified information or creating perverse incentives around catastrophic events. If regulators buy this narrative, we're looking at stricter oversight or outright bans on markets covering geopolitical events, defense spending, or conflict outcomes.

articles.title: PolyGun Acquires Polymarket Analytics in a Landmark Deal for the Prediction Market Industry
articles.summary: PolyGun just bought Polymarket Analytics in what's being called a major deal for the prediction markets space. The acquisition signals serious consolidation in the industry and could give PolyGun significantly better data tools to compete with the big players.

articles.title: Recession odds jump on Kalshi after oil tops $100
articles.summary: Oil prices cracked $100 per barrel, sending recession odds soaring on Kalshi as traders bet that energy shocks will tank the economy. Smart money is already positioning for Fed policy pivots and defensive plays, making energy-linked recession markets the new barometer for macro sentiment.

articles.title: Cboe Introduces Innovative Prediction Markets Framework, Expanding Choice Beyond Yes-Or-No Outcomes
articles.summary: Cboe just launched a new prediction markets framework that goes beyond simple binary yes/no bets, offering more complex outcome structures. This opens the door for richer betting markets with multiple scenarios and nuanced predictions, giving traders more ways to express their views and potentially better odds.

articles.title: How to Prevent Insider Trading on Trump’s Wars
articles.summary: Trump's potential return to office raises serious concerns about government officials using advance knowledge of military actions to profit from defense stocks and related markets. Prediction markets betting on geopolitical events could face massive manipulation if insiders know about planned strikes, troop deployments, or diplomatic moves before they become public.

articles.title: Kalshi Teams Up With Brazil’s XP for First International Push
articles.summary: Kalshi is partnering with Brazilian financial giant XP to expand prediction markets internationally for the first time. This marks a huge step toward global adoption of regulated event betting, potentially opening up massive new liquidity pools and trading opportunities beyond US markets.

articles.title: Prediction Markets Are Booming, but I'd Rather Bet on These 3 AI Stocks
articles.summary: Someone's arguing that AI stocks offer better returns than the prediction market boom everyone's talking about. Smart money might be right, since AI companies with actual revenue streams could outperform platforms that just facilitate betting on future events.

articles.title: Insider Trading Is Going to Get People Killed
articles.summary: High-frequency insider trading and market manipulation are escalating to the point where desperate traders facing massive losses will resort to violence against whistleblowers, regulators, or rival traders. Prediction markets better brace for similar dynamics as big money enters the space, since the same people gaming traditional markets will bring their win-at-all-costs mentality to political and event betting.

articles.title: Opinion: The immorality of betting on war
articles.summary: Someone's arguing that placing bets on military conflicts crosses an ethical line that prediction markets shouldn't cross. The debate matters because war-related markets generate serious volume on platforms like Kalshi and Metaculus, and regulatory crackdowns could follow if public sentiment turns against these contracts.

articles.title: Exclusive | Kalshi and Polymarket Are Each Eyeing Roughly $20 Billion Valuations
articles.summary: Kalshi and Polymarket are both reportedly seeking valuations around $20 billion in their next funding rounds. If either platform hits that mark, it would signal that prediction markets have officially graduated from niche betting curiosity to legitimate financial infrastructure that VCs think can rival major exchanges.
